name: Praying Mantis Nymph
description: A fast and aggressive Grounded 2 mantis nymph that mixes jumps, claw strikes, and close-range pressure.
behavior: It stays near its spawn point and attacks as soon as it finds an opening.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks the player immediately and uses high mobility to keep pressing.
interactionWithCreatures: It often fights other insects if they enter its area.
strategy: Do not let it loop jump-and-punish patterns. Break its rhythm and counter after its landings.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Slash: 75. 3-Hit Combo Slash: 75. Charged Strike: 100. Pounce: 90. Vertical Shockwave: 85.

abilities.name: Slash
abilities.description: A fast claw slash used to open the exchange and pin you in front of it.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo Slash
abilities.description: A short fast chain used to punish panicked answers at close range.

abilities.name: Charged Strike
abilities.description: It delays briefly before delivering a much heavier and more dangerous hit.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.description: It suddenly launches forward to recover the distance you just created.

abilities.name: Vertical Shockwave
abilities.description: It slams the ground hard to cover the immediate space with a dangerous wave.
